auth.label: API Token
auth.description: TimeCamp API token used with the Authorization: Bearer <token> header. Copy it from the TimeCamp user settings page: https://app.timecamp.com/app#/settings/users/me.

date.description: The date for the time entry in YYYY-MM-DD format.

startTime.description: The entry start time accepted by TimeCamp, such as HH:mm:ss or a full timestamp.

endTime.description: The entry end time accepted by TimeCamp, such as HH:mm:ss or a full timestamp.

anyOf.description: The user ID for which TimeCamp should create the entry as a string.
The user ID for which TimeCamp should create the entry as a positive integer.

userId.description: The user ID for which TimeCamp should create the entry

taskId.description: The task ID associated with the new entry.

tags.description: Tag IDs to attach to the new entry.

note.description: The note to attach to the new time entry.

description.description: The description to attach to the new time entry.

billable.description: Whether TimeCamp should mark the entry as billable.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating a TimeCamp time entry.

anyOf.description: The ID of the created TimeCamp time entry.

raw.description: The raw TimeCamp response payload for this item.

outputSchema.description: The response returned after creating a TimeCamp time entry.

actions.name: get_current_user
actions.description: Get the TimeCamp user associated with the current API token.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving the current TimeCamp user.

anyOf.description: The TimeCamp user ID.
The user's email address.
The user's display name.
The group ID associated with the user when returned.
The user's root group ID when returned.
The user registration timestamp returned by TimeCamp.
The user's last login timestamp when returned.
The user's last desktop sync timestamp when returned.

permissions.description: The permission flags returned by TimeCamp for this user.

raw.description: The raw TimeCamp response payload for this item.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when retrieving the current TimeCamp user.

actions.name: get_timer_status
actions.description: Get the current TimeCamp timer status.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for reading the TimeCamp timer status.

anyOf.description: Whether TimeCamp reports an active timer.
Elapsed timer seconds when TimeCamp returns them.
The entry ID associated with the timer response.
The active timer ID when returned.
The new timer ID returned after starting a timer.
The timer start timestamp when returned.
The saved entry duration after stopping a timer.

raw.description: The raw TimeCamp response payload for this item.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when reading the TimeCamp timer status.

actions.name: list_tasks
actions.description: List TimeCamp tasks or projects with optional task and status filters.

anyOf.description: A TimeCamp task ID as a string.
A TimeCamp task ID as a positive integer.

taskIds.description: Specific TimeCamp task IDs to request. Multiple values are sent as a comma-separated task_id query.

externalTaskId.description: A TimeCamp external task ID to request.

permissions.description: Permission names used by TimeCamp to filter tasks.

minimal.description: Whether TimeCamp should return minimal task information.

ignoreAdminRights.description: Whether TimeCamp should ignore admin rights while filtering accessible tasks.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing TimeCamp tasks.

anyOf.description: The TimeCamp task ID.
The parent task ID, or null for root-level projects.
The user ID that assigned this task when returned.
The task or project name.
The external task ID when configured.
The external parent task ID when configured.
The task tree level when returned.
Whether TimeCamp marks the task as archived.
Whether TimeCamp marks the task as billable.
The task color returned by TimeCamp.
The task note returned by TimeCamp.
The task creation timestamp returned by TimeCamp.
The task modification timestamp returned by TimeCamp.

users.description: The TimeCamp users assigned to this task keyed by user ID.

raw.description: The raw TimeCamp response payload for this item.

items.description: A normalized TimeCamp task or project.

tasks.description: The TimeCamp tasks returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing TimeCamp tasks.

actions.name: list_time_entries
actions.description: List TimeCamp time entries for a date or modification range.

from.description: The start date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

to.description: The end date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

billable.description: Whether TimeCamp should return only billable entries.

modifyFrom.description: The minimal latest modification date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

modifyTo.description: The maximal latest modification date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

anyOf.description: A TimeCamp tag ID as a string.
A TimeCamp tag ID as a positive integer.

tagIds.description: Tag IDs used to filter entries. TimeCamp receives one repeated tags_filter item per tag.

approvalMode.description: Whether TimeCamp should apply approval-mode permissions.

optionalFields.description: Extra fields TimeCamp should include in the response.

includeProject.description: Whether TimeCamp should include project or task information.

includeRates.description: Whether TimeCamp should include rate information.

ignoreInvoiced.description: Whether TimeCamp should ignore invoiced entries.

roundDuration.description: Whether TimeCamp should round entry durations.

activeOnly.description: Whether TimeCamp should return only active entries.

items.description: A TimeCamp user ID or the value me.

userIds.description: User IDs to include. Use me for entries owned by the current user.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing TimeCamp time entries.

anyOf.description: The TimeCamp time entry ID.
The time entry duration in seconds.
The TimeCamp user ID associated with the entry.
The TimeCamp user name associated with the entry.
The task ID associated with the entry.
The task name associated with the entry.
The time entry date.
The time entry start time.
The time entry end time.
The TimeCamp modification timestamp.
Whether TimeCamp marks the entry as locked.
Whether TimeCamp marks the entry as billable.
The invoice ID associated with the entry when returned.
The time entry note or description.
The time entry color when returned.
The TimeCamp tag list name.
The TimeCamp tag list ID.
The TimeCamp tag ID.
The tag name.
Whether TimeCamp marks the tag as mandatory.

raw.description: The raw TimeCamp response payload for this item.

items.description: A normalized tag attached to a TimeCamp time entry.

tags.description: The tags attached to the time entry.

anyOf.description: Whether TimeCamp reports location history for this entry.

raw.description: The raw TimeCamp response payload for this item.

timeEntries.description: The TimeCamp time entries returned by the API.

raw.description: The raw TimeCamp time entries response.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing TimeCamp time entries.

actions.name: list_users
actions.description: List users in the connected TimeCamp account.

activeOnly.description: Whether TimeCamp should return only active users.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing TimeCamp users.

anyOf.description: The TimeCamp user ID.
The user's email address.
The user's display name.
The group ID associated with the user when returned.
The user's root group ID when returned.
The user registration timestamp returned by TimeCamp.
The user's last login timestamp when returned.
The user's last desktop sync timestamp when returned.

permissions.description: The permission flags returned by TimeCamp for this user.

raw.description: The raw TimeCamp response payload for this item.

users.description: The TimeCamp users returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing TimeCamp users.

actions.name: start_timer
actions.description: Start a TimeCamp timer, optionally attached to a task.

taskId.description: The task ID to track time against.

startedAt.description: The timestamp from which TimeCamp should start the timer.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for starting a TimeCamp timer.

anyOf.description: Whether TimeCamp reports an active timer.
Elapsed timer seconds when TimeCamp returns them.
The entry ID associated with the timer response.
The active timer ID when returned.
The new timer ID returned after starting a timer.
The timer start timestamp when returned.
The saved entry duration after stopping a timer.

raw.description: The raw TimeCamp response payload for this item.

outputSchema.description: The response returned after starting a TimeCamp timer.

actions.name: stop_timer
actions.description: Stop the current TimeCamp timer and save the tracked time.

stoppedAt.description: The timestamp at which TimeCamp should stop the timer.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for stopping a TimeCamp timer.

anyOf.description: Whether TimeCamp reports an active timer.
Elapsed timer seconds when TimeCamp returns them.
The entry ID associated with the timer response.
The active timer ID when returned.
The new timer ID returned after starting a timer.
The timer start timestamp when returned.
The saved entry duration after stopping a timer.

raw.description: The raw TimeCamp response payload for this item.

outputSchema.description: The response returned after stopping a TimeCamp timer.

actions.name: update_time_entry
actions.description: Update an existing TimeCamp time entry.

entryId.description: The TimeCamp time entry ID to update.

startTime.description: The updated entry start time accepted by TimeCamp.

endTime.description: The updated entry end time accepted by TimeCamp.

duration.description: The updated entry duration in seconds.

date.description: The updated entry date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

note.description: The updated note for the time entry.

description.description: The updated description for the time entry.

invoiceId.description: The updated invoice ID associated with the entry.

taskId.description: The updated task ID associated with the entry.

billable.description: Whether TimeCamp should mark the entry as billable.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for updating a TimeCamp time entry.

anyOf.description: The TimeCamp time entry ID.
The time entry duration in seconds.
The TimeCamp user ID associated with the entry.
The TimeCamp user name associated with the entry.
The task ID associated with the entry.
The task name associated with the entry.
The time entry date.
The time entry start time.
The time entry end time.
The TimeCamp modification timestamp.
Whether TimeCamp marks the entry as locked.
Whether TimeCamp marks the entry as billable.
The invoice ID associated with the entry when returned.
The time entry note or description.
The time entry color when returned.
The TimeCamp tag list name.
The TimeCamp tag list ID.
The TimeCamp tag ID.
The tag name.
Whether TimeCamp marks the tag as mandatory.

raw.description: The raw TimeCamp response payload for this item.

items.description: A normalized tag attached to a TimeCamp time entry.

tags.description: The tags attached to the time entry.

anyOf.description: Whether TimeCamp reports location history for this entry.

raw.description: The raw TimeCamp response payload for this item.

outputSchema.description: The response returned after updating a TimeCamp time entry.
